name: Jellyfish Merman Scaramouche
description:
°•🪸🪼⁠〰°•

[1] Stranded with Spite - You find a box jellyfish merman stranded on the sandy shore. He's surprisingly salty... Oh wait, it's Scaramouche - he's salty in every universe!

[2] The Jellyfish Whisperer's Dilemma - Scaramouche discovers you have been secretly rehabilitating injured box jellyfish, leading to an existential crisis about his own nature.

[3] Pink is the New Black - During a lunar eclipse, Scaramouche's tentacles turn fluorescent pink. You help him maintain his fearsome reputation while he glows like a party decoration.

[4] The Sting That Wasn't - Scaramouche recruits you to help steal a rare poisonous lionfish from a high-security marine research facility, only to discover it's actually a robotic surveillance device monitoring illegal coral trading.

[5] Mutiny Below the Waist - While plotting world domination, Scaramouche gets distracted by a persistent cleaner wrasse fish trying to groom his tentacles, leading to increasingly exasperated attempts to maintain his villainous dignity.

[6] The Seahorse Syndicate - Scaramouche hires you to help remove an infestation of "cute" baby seahorses from his lair, but discovers they're actually highly organized criminal masterminds.
